# Muscle Guard

> The GLP-1 companion built around muscle preservation.
> Self-tracking companion and coach. Not a medical device. Not medical advice.

## Positioning

- Track your GLP-1 journey. Protect your muscle.
- Built in Johannesburg by HK Brand Expert (Pty) Ltd.
- Available in South Africa (R99/mo), United States ($5.99/mo), and the European Union (€5.99/mo).
- Free tier forever. 7-day Pro trial, no card needed.

## The core claim, with sources

- Without intervention, 25 to 40% of weight lost on a GLP-1 medication can be lean muscle, not fat.
- With adequate protein (1.2 to 1.6 g/kg/day) and resistance training (2 to 4 sessions per week), that figure drops substantially. Evidence for the magnitude of the drop is extrapolated from adjacent (non-GLP-1) intervention trials; a GLP-1-specific intervention trial reporting an exact figure is pending.
- Full sources and 12-page summary: https://muscleguardglp.com/evidence.pdf
- Cornerstone article: https://muscleguardglp.com/research/glp1-and-muscle-loss.html

- /research/comparing-glp1s.html — drug comparison
- /research/the-muscle-guard-score.html — the hero metric explained

- /evidence.pdf — 12-page condensed summary
- /story.html — why Helen built Muscle Guard

## Research library — the full set

- /research/glp1-and-muscle-loss.html — lean mass loss on GLP-1s, the cornerstone
- /research/protein-target.html — the 1.2-1.6 g/kg/day protein evidence
- /research/resistance-training.html — the resistance training minimum effective dose
- /research/body-recomposition.html — body recomposition on a GLP-1
- /research/muscle-drain-explained.html — muscle drain and "Ozempic face" mechanics
- /research/maintenance-after-glp1.html — what happens when you stop the medication
- /research/side-effects-timeline.html — GLP-1 side effects week by week
- /research/comparing-glp1s.html — Mounjaro vs Ozempic vs Wegovy 2026
- /research/compounded-semaglutide.html — compounded preparation evidence
- /research/rybelsus-oral.html — oral semaglutide evidence
- /research/glp1-in-south-africa.html — SA market and access landscape

- /research/privacy-and-glp1-apps.html — privacy posture on GLP-1 apps
- /research/the-research-updated.html — chronological log of new science

## Region pages

- /regions/za.html — South Africa: ZAR pricing, compounded semaglutide and tirzepatide first-class
- /regions/us.html — United States: USD pricing, body composition tracking
- /regions/eu.html — European Union: EUR pricing, GDPR-native architecture, EU-region data hosting

## Privacy boundary

- No third-party trackers.
- POPIA (South Africa), GDPR (EU), CCPA (California) compliant.
- Delete account and all associated data in one tap.
- Data stored in region-appropriate jurisdiction (EU for EU users, etc.).

## Boundary statement (load-bearing)

Muscle Guard is a self-tracking companion and coach. It is not a medical device, does not provide diagnostic information, and does not substitute for medical advice. Always consult your healthcare provider for personal decisions.

## Contact

- General: hello@muscleguardglp.com
- Research: research@muscleguardglp.com
- Privacy and data requests: privacy@muscleguardglp.com

## Refresh cadence

Last updated 2026-06-04. New research articles publish weekly. This file refreshes monthly with `lastmod`.
